nasb.text: The sons of Judah according to their families were: of Shelah, the family of the Shelanites; of Perez, the family of the Perezites; of Zerah, the family of the Zerahites.

esv.text: And the sons of Judah according to their clans were: of Shelah, the clan of the Shelanites; of Perez, the clan of the Perezites; of Zerah, the clan of the Zerahites.

cnv.text: 猶大子孫，按著家族，屬示拉的，有示拉家族；屬法勒斯的，有法勒斯家族；屬謝拉的，有謝拉家族。

ccb.text: 犹大的子孙有示拉族、法勒斯族、谢拉族。
